sections.paragraph:
verb לסדור

to arrange, put in order

verb לסדר

to arrange, put in order; settle; "fix", take revenge on; arrange the Seder; set type

verb סודר (>>סֻדַּר)

be arranged, put in order; be settled; be "fixed", framed, "done"; set in type

verb להסתדר

be arranged; settled down; to manage; fall in

verb להסדיר

to settle, arrange; regulate, regularize

verb הוסדר

be settled, arranged; regulated, regularized

verb לסדר (>>סידר)

to arrange, put in order; settle

masculine noun

typesetter, compositor

masculine noun

composition (printing) ; set-up type

masculine noun

order, arrangement, succession, orderliness, neatness, tidiness, trimness, form; sequence

masculine noun

Seder (Passover night service)

masculine noun

section, chapter (ancient)
